parameters.name: x-opus-org-id
parameters.description: Organization ID. Required for users with multiple organizations.

parameters.name: collectionId
parameters.description: The unique collection ID of the collection that you want to delete.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description:
**Query type**
 `q = mine` means list collections of your account.
 `q = findByContentId` means list collections contained the specific content(clip).

parameters.name: contentId
parameters.description: If specified, will only return collections that contain the clip with this contentID.

limit.description: Limit number in this paged query

parameters.name: collectionId
parameters.description: The collectionID of the collection that you want to export

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: The jobId that you want to get the status of.

get.description: Retrieve the connected social destinations available for social posting.

postAccountId.description: Unique ID of the connected social account record

subAccountId.description: Sub-account ID for Facebook pages, Instagram business accounts, or LinkedIn person or org URNs

extUserName.description: Display name from the third-party platform

post.description: Create an asynchronous social copy generation job for a specific clip and destination account.

example.prompt: Write the caption in a playful, witty tone that uses humor to keep the audience engaged, while ending with a clear call to action.

clipId.description: Bare clip ID (e.g. `CUexample1`). **Not** the composite `{projectId}.{clipId}` form returned as `id` by `GET /api/exportable-clips` — pass only the part after the dot.

postAccountId.description: Unique ID of the connected social account record

subAccountId.description: Sub-account ID used by Facebook pages, Instagram business accounts, or LinkedIn

prompt.description: Custom style or tone instruction for generation

forceRegenerate.description: Whether to bypass the cached result and regenerate

201.description: Successfully created a social copy generation job

jobId.description: Unique ID of the social copy generation job

get.description: Get the current status and generated copy for a social copy generation job.

parameters.description: Unique ID of the social copy generation job

data.title: My Daughter's 'Gift' at 3 AM
data.description: Thought I was losing my mind. Hear walking at 3 AM, check the house - everyone's asleep. Then I see it... my daughter's 'gift' moved. My wife has some explaining to do!

jobId.description: Unique ID of the social copy generation job

status.description: Status of the social copy generation job

cached.description: Whether the result came from cache

post.description: Publish a clip immediately to a connected social account. Each X (formerly Twitter) post costs 1 credit.

custom.description: Okay, so my daughter got a doll that can apparently move on its own. Last night at 3 AM, I heard footsteps, went to check, and this thing had moved! Totally thought I was losing my mind. Anyone else's toys play tricks? #CreepyDoll #HauntedHouse #MomLife #ParentingFails #ScaryStories

clipId.description: Bare clip ID (e.g. `qU3iVMSO77`). **Not** the composite `{projectId}.{clipId}` form returned as `id` by `GET /api/exportable-clips` — pass only the part after the dot.

postAccountId.description: Unique ID of the connected social account record

subAccountId.description: Sub-account ID used by Facebook pages, Instagram business accounts, or LinkedIn

mediaType.description: Media type. Supported values depend on the connected platform

description.description: Description of the post, including hashtags

postId.description: Unique ID of the post task

post.description: Schedule a clip to be published later. The `publishAt` value must be a future UTC ISO 8601 timestamp. Each X (formerly Twitter) post costs 1 credit.

custom.description: Okay, so my daughter got a doll that can apparently move on its own. Last night at 3 AM, I heard footsteps, went to check, and this thing had moved! Totally thought I was losing my mind. Anyone else's toys play tricks? #CreepyDoll #HauntedHouse #MomLife #ParentingFails #ScaryStories

clipId.description: Bare clip ID (e.g. `qU3iVMSO77`). **Not** the composite `{projectId}.{clipId}` form returned as `id` by `GET /api/exportable-clips` — pass only the part after the dot.

postAccountId.description: Unique ID of the connected social account record

subAccountId.description: Sub-account ID used by Facebook pages, Instagram business accounts, or LinkedIn

publishAt.description: Future publish time in UTC ISO 8601 format

mediaType.description: Media type. Supported values depend on the connected platform

description.description: Description of the post, including hashtags

scheduleId.description: Unique ID of the created schedule task

delete.description: Cancel a scheduled publish task before its publish time.

parameters.name: scheduleId
parameters.description: Unique ID of the schedule task to cancel

post.description: Experimental. Subject to change; daily caps apply and the endpoint may be temporarily disabled via a runtime kill switch. Currently the only published `jobType` is `thumbnail` (7 credits/call, charged on success and refunded on failure).

get.description: Experimental. Returns status, progress, and result for a job created via `POST /api/generative-jobs`. For `thumbnail` jobs, the `result.generatedThumbnailUris` array contains the CDN URLs of the produced thumbnails when `status` is `CONCLUDED`.

Fetch the trimmed source-video transcript for a project. ASR internals (seek, tokens, log-probabilities, etc.) are stripped. For API callers on a range-limited project, paragraphs are filtered to the billed curation range; internal callers and full-source submissions get the full transcript.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Query variant. Public callers must pass `findByProjectId`.

enabled.description: Indicates if the stroke is enabled.
Indicates if the shadow is enabled.

x.description: The x offset of the shadow.

y.description: The y offset of the shadow.

blur.description: The blur radius of the shadow.

useWordHighlightColor.description: Indicates if the word highlight color should be used for the shadow.

stroke.description: The stroke settings of the font.

shadow.description: The shadow settings of the font.

path.description: The storage path of the font.

numericalSize.description: The numerical size of the font.

textDecoration.description: The text decoration of the font.

enableScreenLayout.description: Enables screen layout for the video.

enableCaption.description: Enables caption overlay on the video.

enableUppercase.description: Converts all characters to uppercase in captions.

enableEmoji.description: Enables emoji overlay on the video.

enableFillLayout.description: Enables fill layout for a single person.

enableSplitLayout.description: Enables split layout for two people.

enableFitLayout.description: Enables fit layout for multiple people.

fitLayoutCropRatio.description: Specifies the crop ratio for fit layout.

enableVisualHook.description: Enables visual hook overlay, deprecated and should always be false.

enableBroll.description: Enables B-Roll overlay on the video.

highlightColor.description: Highlight colors for keywords in captions.

type.description: Specifies the action to be taken upon project conclusion. Options include sending an email or triggering a webhook.

notifyFailure.description: Indicates whether to notify on failure.

email.description: Email address to send notifications to, if type is EMAIL.

url.description: Webhook URL to trigger, if type is WEBHOOK.

startSec.description: The start time of the range to be curated.

endSec.description: The end time of the range to be curated.

clipDurations.description: Durations (in seconds) of the clips to be generated. Default value is [0, 90]. Other possible values are: [0, 30], [30, 60], [60, 90], [90, 180].

topicKeywords.description: Keywords used to find relevant moments to clip from

range.description: The range of the original long-form video to generate clips from.

genre.description: The genre of the clips, will apply suitable AI curation models to find the best results.

sourceLang.description: Select the language to detect the video's spoken content, or leave it blank for automatic detection. Using ISO-639 language codes, examples: "en" for English, "de" for German, "fr" for French.

videoUrl.description:
This parameter defines the url of the long-form video. OpusClip can import public videos from the following platforms: 
- YouTube, Google Drive, Vimeo, Zoom, Rumble, Twitch, Facebook, LinkedIn, X, Dropbox, Riverside, Loom, Frame.io, StreamYard
- Any public video s3 link of an mp4 file (up to 10GB per video)

conclusionActions.description: Actions to be taken upon project conclusion, such as sending an email or triggering a webhook.

curationPref.description: Preferences for advanced curation of the video.

importPref.description: Preferences for importing the video, such as source language.

brandTemplateId.description: ID of the brand template to be used for the project.

id.description: The unique identifier of the project.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the user.

orgId.description: The unique identifier of the organization.

isDeleted.description: Indicates whether the project is deleted.

isPurged.description: Indicates whether the project is purged.

projectId.description: The unique identifier of the project.

sourcePlatform.description: The platform from which the video is sourced.

sourceId.description: The unique identifier for the video on the source platform.

sourceUri.description: The URI of the source video.

productTier.description: The product tier of the project.

stage.description: The current stage of the project.

model.description: The AI clipping model used for the project.

stallCount.description: The number of times the project has stalled.

workerUrl.description: The URL of the worker processing the project.

curationPref.description: Preferences for advanced curation of the video.

storageSize.description: The total size of the project in bytes.

storageStatus.description: The storage status of the project.

storageExpireAt.description: The expiration date of the project storage.

renderPref.description: Preferences for rendering the video, including layout and overlay options.

refundStatus.description: The refund status of the project.

createdAt.description: The date and time when the project was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time when the project was last updated.

clusterJobId.description: The unique identifier of the cluster job processing the project.

cluster.description: The cluster on which the project is running.

importPref.description: Preferences for importing the video, such as source language.

visibility.description: The visibility of the project. `DEFAULT`: Team members can open, edit and export the project. `PUBLIC`: Anyone can open, edit and export the project.

uriForPreview.description: Google Cloud Storage URI of video for preview

uriForExport.description: Google Cloud Storage URI of video for export/download

timeRanges.description: Original time ranges of the clip (in seconds)

title.example: Connect Through Passion: The Power of Ensemble Performance

description.example: Experience the magic of live performance as our talented cellist captivates the audience with her passionate playing. Witness the seamless coordination of the ensemble in a breathtaking display of musical artistry that will leave you inspired!

q.description:
**Query type**
 `findByCollectionIdAndContentId` is the only valid value, means delete relation by collectionId + contentId

collectionId.description: The collectionID of the collection that you want to remove the clip from.

contentId.description: The ID of the clip that you want to remove from the collection. FullClipId: {projectId}.{curationId}

collectionId.description: The collectionID of the collection that the clip was added to.

contentId.description: The ID of the clip that has been added to the collection. FullClipId: {projectId}.{curationId}

collectionId.description: The collectionID of the collection that you want to add the clip to.

contentId.description: The ID of the clip that you want to add to the collection. FullClipId: {projectId}.{curationId}

collectionName.description: The name of the collection that you have created.

createdAt.description: The date and time the collection was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the collection was updated.

collectionName.description: The name of the collection that you want to create.

contentList.description: A list of download links for all the clips in that collection.

beepSound.description: Use beep sound instead of the censored words.

projectId.description: The project id that you want to censor.

clipId.description: The clip id that you want to censor.

options.description: Some options for the censor job.

jobId.description: If the job was created successfully, this will contain the job ID.

message.description: A message indicating the result of the job creation.

status.description: The status of the censor job.

limit.description: Limit number in this paged query

jobType.description: The type of generative job to create. Currently the only published value is `thumbnail`.

sourceUri.description: URL of the source video to extract thumbnails from.

referenceImageUri.description: Optional reference image URL. The thumbnail composition draws stylistic cues from this image. Upload via `POST /api/upload-links` with `usecase: 'FreeToolMedia'`, then pass the returned `cdnUrl` here.

maskImageUri.description: Optional mask image URL for inpainting.

prompt.description: Optional text prompt steering the thumbnail composition.
prompt.example: punchy red overlay, bold sans-serif title

jobId.description: The generated job ID. Use it with `GET /api/generative-jobs/{jobId}` to poll status and fetch results.

result.description: Present when `status` is `CONCLUDED` and the job produced output.

progress.description: Present while the job is `QUEUED` or `PROCESSING`, and on `CONCLUDED` as a final snapshot.

error.description: Present when `status` is `FAILED` or when result extraction failed for a `CONCLUDED` job.

generatedThumbnailUris.description: CDN URLs of the produced thumbnails. Typically 4 images per successful thumbnail job.

GenerativeJobProgress.description: Progress snapshot for an in-flight or completed generative job.

GenerativeJobError.description: User-facing error info for a failed generative job.

TranscriptResponse.description: Wrapper for the transcript response. `data[0]` is the transcript, or `null` when the project has no transcript yet.

TranscriptExportParagraph.description: A paragraph of the transcript with timing and optional speaker attribution.

text.example: Hello and welcome to the show.

speaker.description: Speaker label, when diarization is available.

TranscriptExportWord.description: A single word with start/end timings and optional filler-word flag.

isFillerWord.description: True if the word is a filler (um, uh, ...).
